mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MEMBER(MEMBER_LOGINID, MEMBER_NAME, MEMBER_EMAIL, MEMBER_PW, MEMBER_TEL) VALUES(#{memberLoginId}, #{memberName}, #{memberEmail}, #{memberPw}, #{memberTel})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MEMBER WHERE MEMBER_LOGINID = #{loginId}

SELECT MEMBER_ID AS memberId, MEMBER_LOGINID AS memberLoginId, MEMBER_NAME AS memberName, MEMBER_EMAIL AS memberEmail, MEMBER_TEL AS memberTel FROM MEMBER WHERE MEMBER_LOGINID = #{loginId} AND MEMBER_PW = #{pw}
